text:
The Madan's Book (マダンの書, Madan no Sho), Hunter × Hunter: Each One's Determination alternatively called the Book of Madan, is a game exclusive item in the Wonderswan Color game Hunter × Hunter: Each One's Determination. It appears in Leorio's route.

Appearance

The Madan's Book is a brown textbook with floral designs on the side of its pages. Non-Nen users will only see its contents as blank. However, if one used Gyo, the text would appear to them. Its contents are on medical procedures and herbs that can assist in medicines. 

Background

The book was originally found at a local library dedicated to rare books by Hari. Donal, the chief leader of a 10-person facility, would soon take it for himself. However, Hari believed he would merely use it for his interests. Thus, she revolves around stealing the book and heading onto an airship without a ticket. 

Plot

Each One's Determination

 Note: Events occurring in Each One's Determination doesn't constitute canon material. 

As Leorio enters his room, he finds Hari already inside, pretending it's her room. He then finds himself immediately locked out. Believing he is gone, she soon comes out and talks to herself. When she mocks Leorio, he suddenly rushes back and yells at her—right before being hit by her purse. After regaining his senses, he then notices a book: the Madan's Book. Confused by its contents, he decides to keep it with him as he inquires about the woman before. He soon runs into her again at the warehouse where she had been hiding. After she apologizes, Hari asks if he has the book with him. They thus resolve to continue their conversation in Leorio's room. 

The researcher attempts to have Leorio read it, but to no avail. There, Hari then explains the book to him. She states that Donal was the one who told her about it and that it's akin to a medical textbook. She has only briefly skimmed through it, though. After their conversation, one of Donal's text subjects finds her. He proceeds to blind her and try to coax her to tell him where the book is—right before Leorio steps in. Because of this, she seemingly can't read its contents and soon receives a fever, forcing her to the hospital. 

Hari keeps the book with her during her stay. During Leorio's second visit, he questions a nearby nurse in the book. Said nurse states that she still has it with her. However, while checking on her at one point, she claims to have seen Hari reading it despite her eyes' condition preventing her. This perplexes both her and Leorio. When Leorio goes to question her, though, both Hari and one of the Majtani clones end up arguing, which has him leave instead. As he explores Zaban City, he overhears two hunters discussing Gyo. This makes him realize that’s what Hari is using, and he heads back to the hospital. 

When he arrives, though, both Hari and the book are missing. He soon finds her in the lobby talking to Machi. After Leorio and Hari head back to the patient’s room, she reveals she gave the book to Machi in exchange for information on Donal. This is because of her knowing her five years prior. When Leorio attempts to ask her about Nen, Hari is confused. This is because she unconsciously uses it. After more questioning, Hari reluctantly agrees to reveal how she was able to read it. 

Once Leorio properly learns Nen a day later, he manages to use Gyo on the Madan's Book. The duo proceed to read together. Here, they learn that darkness flowers, a necessary ingredient for curing Hari, can be found in Milsy Wetlands. Thus, using the book's map, he resolves to track it down. However, he runs in Machi. She reveals that not only does Donal know of Hari's location, but Machi herself told him. After being tied up, Leorio agrees on asking Hari for the book and giving it to Machi so long as she protects her. After Leorio obtains a darkness flower, he silently takes the Madan's Book with him. He then meets with Machi. However, Machi points out Donal hiding in the same room. They agree to instead have Leorio follow him and to deal with the book later. 

At Donal's hideout, Leorio eventually decides to confront him. Donal demands that he give him the book. Leorio refuses to, which results in them fighting. Once Leorio wins though, Donal activates the hideout's self destruct sequence, causing the building to collapse. After managing to escape, Leorio decides to hand the book over to Machi and not return to the hospital.
